task: Compare the Acura CL 2003 with the ILX 2022.
final_result_response:
Successfully navigated to https://www.cars.com/research/compare/?vehicles=acura-cl-2003,acura-ilx-2022 and completed the full comparison between the 2003 Acura CL and the 2022 Acura ILX. Here is the complete side-by-side comparison:

## 🏆 Key Takeaways

| Category | Winner |
|---|---|
| **Price** | 🏅 2022 ILX ($900 cheaper) |
| **Fuel Economy** | 🏅 2022 ILX (24/34 vs. 20/29 MPG) |
| **Horsepower** | 🏅 2003 CL (225 hp vs. 201 hp) |
| **Consumer Rating** | 🏅 2022 ILX (5.0 vs. 4.6 stars) |
| **Seating** | 🏅 2022 ILX (5 seats vs. 4) |
| **Trunk Space** | 🏅 2003 CL (14 ft³ vs. 12 ft³) |
| **Safety Tech** | 🏅 2022 ILX (AEB, LDW, backup cam, stability control) |
| **Ground Clearance** | 🏅 2003 CL (6 in vs. 4 in) |
| **Curb Weight** | 🏅 2022 ILX (lighter at 3,095 lbs) |

The **2022 Acura ILX** wins on modern safety features, fuel efficiency, consumer satisfaction, and practicality (5 seats). The **2003 Acura CL** holds an edge in raw power (V6 engine with 225 hp), trunk space, and ground clearance.
